intent: Default model: manual negative probe; run only in a seeded environment where policy candidates are missing or have non-chat interaction types so chat-like default selection returns the existing no-model-available error
curl: curl -X POST "$GATEWAY_BASE/v1/chat/completions" -H "Authorization: Bearer legend" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"messages":[{"role":"user","content":"dm-002 default model no candidate"}],"max_tokens":4}'
